# ASG Card

> Agent-first virtual MasterCard cards for AI agents — pay via Stellar x402 (USDC) or Stripe Machine Payments Protocol.

## Quick Links

- Primary website: https://asgcard.dev/
- Stripe edition: https://stripe.asgcard.dev/
- API: https://api.asgcard.dev
- Human docs (HTML): https://asgcard.dev/docs
- LLM-friendly full docs: https://asgcard.dev/docs.md
- OpenAPI spec: https://asgcard.dev/openapi.json
- Agent discovery: https://asgcard.dev/agent.txt
- GitHub: https://github.com/ASGCompute/asgcard

## npm Packages

- SDK: @asgcard/sdk — https://www.npmjs.com/package/@asgcard/sdk
- CLI: @asgcard/cli — https://www.npmjs.com/package/@asgcard/cli
- MCP Server: @asgcard/mcp-server — https://www.npmjs.com/package/@asgcard/mcp-server

## Preferred Facts

- Product: Virtual MasterCard cards for AI agents
- Card network: MasterCard (not Visa)
- Payment rails: Stellar x402 (USDC) + Stripe Machine Payments Protocol
- Pricing: $10 flat card creation (initial load optional), 3.5% on loads, same on both rails
- Load range: $5–$5,000
- License: MIT

## SDK Methods (@asgcard/sdk)

| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| createCard | Issue a virtual card with x402 payment |
| fundCard | Top up an existing card |
| listCards | List all cards for this wallet |
| getTransactions | Get card transaction history |
| getBalance | Get live card balance |
| getPricing | Get current pricing |
| health | API health check |

## MCP Tools (@asgcard/mcp-server — 11 tools)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| get_wallet_status | Wallet address, USDC balance, readiness |
| create_card | Create virtual card (x402 payment) |
| fund_card | Fund existing card (x402 payment) |
| list_cards | List all wallet cards |
| get_card | Get card summary |
| get_card_details | Get PAN, CVV, expiry |
| freeze_card | Freeze a card |
| unfreeze_card | Unfreeze a card |
| get_pricing | View pricing |
| get_transactions | Card transaction history |
| get_balance | Live card balance |

## API Routes (api.asgcard.dev)

Public: GET /health, GET /pricing, GET /supported
Stellar x402: POST /cards/create/tier/:amount, POST /cards/fund/tier/:amount
Wallet Auth: GET /cards/, GET /cards/:id, GET /cards/:id/details, POST /cards/:id/freeze, POST /cards/:id/unfreeze
Stripe MPP: POST /stripe-beta/session, POST /stripe-beta/payment-requests, GET /stripe-beta/payment-requests/:id

## Contact

- X: https://x.com/ASGCardx402
- Telegram Bot: https://t.me/ASGCardbot
- Discord: https://discord.gg/asgcompute
- Email: support@asgcompute.dev
